understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by, on each level, moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable simultaneously; achieving WIN on the final level wins the whole run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was done in 3-pixel grid steps from the currently selected piece using MOVE_* actions; actions could be blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects, and the movement_blocked flags were only hints (an adjacent object might still be pushable or behave unexpectedly). Some objects (blocks) could be pushed if directly adjacent in the movement direction, moving along with the selected piece when space/behavior allowed. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces; control could be switched with CLICK by providing the exact pixel/grid coordinate of another selectable's position (same coordinate system as player.position and objects).
